description:
A screenshot of the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) Core system's "Data Catalogue" user interface, displaying a list of land cover/land use (LULC) datasets with an active "Reuse Ingestion" dialog box overlaid.

The main "Data Catalogue" table shows columns for "EAGLE Approved", "Name", "Type", "Created At", "Created By", "Organisation/s", "Contact Person", "Status", and "INSPIRE Themes". Visible dataset names include "LULUCF Test", "CLC+ Core Review", "N2K 2012", "N2K 2018" (referring to Natura 2000), "Coastal Zones (CZ) 20...", "Riparian Zones (RZ) [unreadable]", and "Urban Atlas (UA) 2012" and "Urban Atlas (UA) 2018". Creation dates range from "20.06.2023" to "23.08.2023". Data statuses include "EXTRACTED_PREVIEW", "DRAFT", "PUBLISHED", and "USED". All listed datasets fall under the "INSPIRE Themes" category of "Land use, Land cover". Pagination indicates "Items per page: 10" and "21 – 30 of 41" items.

The "Reuse Ingestion" dialog is a two-step process, with "1 Input Type Selection" complete and "2 'Dataset Selection Upload Dataset - Vector'" active. It is pre-filled for a dataset named "N2K 2018", associated with "EEA-38+UK European Environment Agency (38+UK)" for both "Country" and "Region". Users can either "File Upload" or "URL Upload" data. The "File Upload" section shows instructions to "Drag and Drop" or "UPLOAD DATASET/S", specifying accepted file formats as ".tif, .TIF, .tiff, .TIFF, .zip, .h5, .gpkg". An "Attribute Name" field is present, pre-filled with "CODE_4_18", with instructions to "Enter Attribute Name from Dataset (column from the attribute table) which shall be used as Input Parameter for the Class Code. Values of the selected attribute column must only contain upper- and [partially obscured]".
